title: Sub tasks to inherit parent columns by default when board is set up as a Project
excerpt: When a board is setup as a Project set the sub tasks (sub items) to inherit all the parent columns by default (with an option for the board owner to turn this off)

posts.author: skmdc (SK)
posts.cookedHtml: When a board is setup as a Project set the sub tasks (sub items) to inherit all the parent columns by default (with an option for the board owner to turn this off)
